citations.quote: The outstanding arrears for your accommodation are £4605.55
From Donnelly, Kathleen <K.Donnelly@napier.ac.uk> on behalf of fees <fees@napier.ac.uk> Date Wed 08/04/2026 13:29 To Elbushra, Anfal <40805511@live.napier.ac.uk>
It has come to our attention that you are in arrears for your accommodation.
If you have made payments, please send copies of your receipts.
Kathleen Donnelly Senior Finance Assistant Edinburgh Napier University Finance Sighthill Campus Sighthill Court Edinburgh EH11 4BN Tel 0131 455 6806

findings.text: Email sent by Kathleen Donnelly on behalf of fees@napier.ac.uk to Anfal Elbushra on 08/04/2026.
Email notifies recipient of arrears and requests payment receipts if already paid.
Sender is Kathleen Donnelly, Senior Finance Assistant at Edinburgh Napier University.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## Arrears Verification Report

**Source:** NAP-SRC-0021 (email from Kathleen Donnelly to Anfal Elbushra, 08/04/2026)

**Arrears Amount:** £4605.55

**Findings:**
- The email states the outstanding arrears amount as £4605.55.
- The email requests payment or receipts if already paid.
- No payment history or receipts are included in the source.

**Uncertainties:**
- No breakdown of the arrears amount.
- No evidence of prior payments or disputes.
- Single source; no independent verification.

**Recommendation:** Obtain payment records from the university or the student to verify the arrears.
proposed_artifacts.title: Arrears Verification Report

proposed_tasks.instructions: Request payment history and receipts from the student (Anfal Elbushra) and/or Edinburgh Napier University finance department to verify the arrears amount and identify any payments made. Source dependencies: NAP-SRC-0021.
proposed_tasks.title: Obtain payment history and receipts

risk_flags.text: No evidence of payment or dispute from the recipient; potential for escalation if arrears remain unpaid.

summary: Verified arrears amount of £4605.55 from email NAP-SRC-0021. No payment history or receipts provided. No contradictions found. Proposed follow-up to obtain payment records.

uncertainties.text: No payment history or receipts are provided in the source; it is unknown whether any payments were made.
The email does not specify the accommodation period or breakdown of the arrears amount.
The source is a single email; no independent verification of the arrears claim exists in the provided materials.
